## 🚀 Setup & Development

1. **Clone the repo** and open this workspace in VS Code.
2. **Initialize your language/framework of choice** (e.g. `npm init`, `dotnet new`,
   `python -m venv venv`, etc.).
3. Add configuration files (`package.json`, `requirements.txt`, etc.) as needed.

Agents should run the standard build/test commands, so document them here once
they exist.
